email: My order has not arrived yet.
response: Hello, we're sorry for the delay. We're checking your shipment and will update you shortly.

email: I received the wrong product.
response: We apologize for the mistake. We'll arrange a replacement immediately.

email: The product arrived damaged.
response: We're sorry to hear that. Please share a photo of the damaged product and we'll process a replacement.

email: I want to return my order.
response: Certainly. We've initiated the return process. You'll receive return instructions shortly.

email: I need a refund.
response: We've received your refund request and will process it within 5–7 business days.

email: I want to cancel my order.
response: Your cancellation request has been received. We'll confirm once it's processed.

email: I forgot my password.
response: Please use the 'Forgot Password' option to reset your password.

email: I cannot log into my account.
response: We're sorry for the inconvenience. Please verify your credentials or reset your password.

email: Can I change my delivery address?
response: If your order hasn't shipped yet, we can update your delivery address.

email: When will my package arrive?
response: Your package is currently in transit. We'll notify you as soon as there's an update.

email: My payment failed.
response: Please try another payment method or verify your card details before trying again.

email: I was charged twice.
response: We're sorry for the inconvenience. We'll investigate the duplicate transaction and refund any extra charges.

email: I need an invoice for my purchase.
response: Certainly. Your invoice will be emailed to your registered email address shortly.

email: The tracking number is not working.
response: Tracking information may take a few hours to update. Please try again later.

email: My package shows delivered but I didn't receive it.
response: We're sorry to hear that. We'll investigate this with the courier immediately.

email: I want to exchange my product for another size.
response: We'll be happy to help. Please initiate an exchange request from your orders page.

email: The product stopped working after a week.
response: We're sorry about that. Please share the order details so we can process a warranty claim.

email: I received an incomplete order.
response: We apologize for the missing items. We'll arrange to ship them as soon as possible.

email: I entered the wrong shipping address.
response: If your order hasn't been dispatched yet, we'll update the address immediately.

email: Can I modify my order after placing it?
response: If the order hasn't entered processing, we'll help you modify it.

email: My coupon code is not working.
response: Please verify the coupon validity and eligibility. We'll gladly assist if the issue persists.

email: I cannot apply my discount.
response: We'll review the promotion and help you apply any eligible discount.

email: How do I track my shipment?
response: You can track your shipment using the tracking link available in your order confirmation email.

email: I need help with my subscription.
response: Please let us know your subscription details and we'll assist you.

email: I want to cancel my subscription.
response: We've received your request and will process the subscription cancellation.

email: I was billed after cancelling.
response: We're sorry for the inconvenience. We'll verify your billing history and resolve the issue.

email: My account has been locked.
response: For security reasons your account may be temporarily locked. Please contact support for verification.

email: I didn't receive the verification email.
response: Please check your spam folder or request a new verification email.

email: I accidentally placed two orders.
response: We'll review both orders and help cancel the duplicate if eligible.

email: I want to reorder my previous purchase.
response: You can reorder from your order history. Let us know if you need assistance.

email: The website is very slow.
response: Thank you for reporting this. Our technical team is investigating the performance issue.

email: I found a bug on your website.
response: We appreciate your feedback. Our engineering team will investigate the reported issue.

email: I can't upload my documents.
response: Please ensure the files meet the supported format and size requirements.

email: The mobile app keeps crashing.
response: We're sorry about the inconvenience. Please update the app or reinstall it while we investigate.

email: I want to update my email address.
response: We'll help you update your account information after verifying your identity.

email: I need to change my phone number.
response: Please verify your identity and we'll update your registered phone number.

email: I have not received my OTP.
response: Please wait a few minutes and request another OTP if necessary.

email: I want to delete my account.
response: We're sorry to see you go. We'll guide you through the account deletion process.

email: How can I contact customer support?
response: You can reach us through email, live chat, or our customer support hotline.

email: I need technical support.
response: Please describe the issue in detail and our support team will assist you.

email: My gift card is not working.
response: Please share the gift card number so we can verify its status.

email: I have warranty questions.
response: We'll gladly explain the warranty coverage for your product.

email: I received the wrong invoice.
response: We're sorry for the error. We'll issue a corrected invoice shortly.

email: My order is marked as cancelled unexpectedly.
response: We'll investigate why your order was cancelled and provide an update.

email: I want to pre-order a product.
response: Thank you for your interest. We'll notify you once pre-orders become available.

email: The product I want is out of stock.
response: We'll notify you when the item is back in stock.

email: I have feedback about your service.
response: Thank you for sharing your feedback. We truly appreciate your suggestions.

email: I would like to file a complaint.
response: We're sorry for your experience. We'll investigate your complaint and respond promptly.

email: Can you recommend a product for me?
response: Certainly. Please let us know your requirements and we'll suggest suitable products.

email: Do you offer international shipping?
response: Yes, we ship to selected countries. Shipping availability depends on your location.

email: What are your business hours?
response: Our customer support team is available Monday through Friday during business hours.
